normalized: Response envelope structure (columns, rows, pagination, execution)
not_normalized_v1: Scalar row value types (Athena returns strings; Databricks returns typed values)

implementation_notes: query_id=None: The databricks-sql-connector does not expose the SQL statement ID via the DB-API cursor interface. This is a v1 connector limitation, not a CLM conformance failure. The field is present in the canonical shape; the value is null.

Row scalar types: Athena returns all values as strings (e.g. "1" for SELECT 1). Databricks may return typed values. Scalar type normalization is outside the CLM v1 scope — the envelope structure (columns, rows, pagination, execution) is fully normalized. This difference is recorded here as an implementation note, not a failure.
